items.name: The Overlord's Testament
items.description: Etched from shadow, reflecting the Overlord's formidable might, this obsidian relic is one amongst just fifteen. These rare trophies were claimed only by those daring enough to traverse every inch of Shadowed Sanctuary ( https://www.roblox.com/games/13972817563/R6-OUTFITS-Shadowed-Sanctuary ). Venturing through each cryptic chapter, they unveiled secrets as numerous as stars in the night sky. At journey's end, the code was cracked, and this trophy was their hard-earned reward. Will you dare to join these select few, to seek and unearth the mystery that awaits?
